name: hybrid-analysis-quick-scan-url-results

outputs.description: The scan ID. HybridAnalysis.URL.SHA256 The SHA256 hash of the indicator.
outputs.name: HybridAnalysis.URL.ScanID

outputs.description: Whether the process completed. HybridAnalysis.URL.Scanner.Name The scanner name.
outputs.name: HybridAnalysis.URL.Finished

outputs.description: The number of positive results. HybridAnalysis.URL.Scanner.Status The status of the file.
outputs.name: HybridAnalysis.URL.Scanner.Positives

outputs.description: The type of ID. HybridAnalysis.URL.Whitelist.Value Whether the indicator is on the allow list.
outputs.name: HybridAnalysis.URL.Whitelist.ID

outputs.description: The SHA256 hash of the file.
outputs.name: File.SHA256
